2604.04344.title: Domain-Contextualized Inference: A Computable Graph Architecture for Explicit-Domain Reasoning
2604.04344.paper_summary: We establish a computation-substrate-agnostic inference architecture in which domain is an explicit first-class computational parameter. This produces domain-scoped pruning that reduces per-query search space from O(N) to O(N/K), substrate-independent execution over symbolic, neural, vector, and hybrid substrates, and transparent inference chains where every step carries its evaluative context. The contribution is architectural, not logical. We formalize the computational theory across five dimensions: a five-layer architecture; three domain computation modes including chain indexing, path traversal as Kleisli composition, and vector-guided computation as a substrate transition; a substrate-agnostic interface with three operations Query, Extend, Bridge; reliability conditions C1 to C4 with three failure mode classes; and validation through a PHQ-9 clinical reasoning case study. The computational theory including operational semantics, complexity bounds, monad structure, substrate transitions, and boundary conditions is the contribution of this paper.
2604.04344.paper_summary_zh: 我們建立了一個計算基底無關的推理架構，其中域是一個明確的一級計算參數。這產生了域範圍的修剪，將每個查詢的搜索空間從 O(N) 減少到 O(N/K)，在符號、神經、向量和混合基底上實現基底獨立執行，以及透明的推理鏈，其中每一步都帶有其評估上下文。這項貢獻是架構性的，而非邏輯性的。我們在五個維度上形式化計算理論：一個五層架構；三種域計算模式，包括鏈索引、作為 Kleisli 組合的路徑遍歷，以及作為基底轉換的向量引導計算；一個基底無關的介面，具有三個操作：查詢、擴展、橋接；可靠性條件 C1 到 C4，具有三個故障模式類別；以及通過 PHQ-9 臨床推理案例研究進行驗證。計算理論包括操作語義、複雜性界限、單子結構、基底轉換和邊界條件是本文的貢獻。
2604.04344.author: Chao Li et.al.
2604.04344.authors: Chao Li, Yuru Wang, Chunyi Zhao
